services: AC and heating repair, new system installation, and maintenance tune-ups for all major brands
service_area: the greater metro area, about a 30-mile radius
hours: 8am-6pm Monday through Saturday, with 24/7 emergency service for no-heat and no-cooling calls
pricing_notes: diagnostic or service-call fee is around $89 and is waived if they book the repair; a maintenance tune-up runs about $99; new system installs vary, so those get a free in-home estimate; financing is available on installs
booking_notes: can usually schedule same-day or next-day for most repairs; collect name, service address, a quick description of the problem, and a preferred day and time window
emergency_examples: no AC during a heat wave, no heat in the cold, a burning smell, or water leaking from the unit
